blockingIssues.description: This change only relaxes fetch expectations in `reviewApi` tests to allow either a relative URL or `http://localhost:3100`, but the feature was supposed to fix persistence and returned-list/review-dialog baseline failures in other test files. No production code or assigned failing tests were updated, so the claimed baseline repair is not implemented by this commit.

The second changed file stabilizes `FileUploadSection` timing, which is outside the scoped failures described for this feature. While the test rewrite may reduce unrelated flakiness, it does not demonstrate that `ResubmissionTaskList.test.ts`, `WorkflowReturnDialog.test.ts`, or the persistence baselines were fixed, leaving the assigned issue unaddressed.

The feature claims to fix timeout failures in `useXeokitMeasurementTools.test.ts`, `MbdPipePanel.mode.test.ts`, `WeldAnnotation3D.test.ts`, `XeokitAngleMeasurement.test.ts`, and `XeokitDistanceMeasurement.test.ts`, but commit `1b9551f` changes only `src/api/reviewApi.test.ts` and `src/components/review/FileUpload.test.ts`. None of the targeted measurement/MBD/annotation files were modified, so this feature does not provide evidence that it addressed the stated baseline failures.

The committed drag-and-drop upload test stabilization is unrelated to measurement, MBD mode, or three-annotation timeout coverage. This means the feature description, expected behavior, and verification narrative are misaligned with the actual code delivered.

This fix changes the selected-component summary text from `已选中 N 个 BRAN 管道构件` to `已选中 N 个构件`. That unrelated UX copy change is outside the close-emission regression scope and breaks the existing binding contract still asserted by `form-binding.test.ts`, so the feature no longer cleanly satisfies its narrowly scoped requirement without collateral behavior drift.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Split baseline-only test-recovery work from designer-tracking flow work, or allow the designer-tracking-worker skill to skip browser/manual verification when the feature scope is strictly CLI test stabilization.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Prior reviewed baseline-fix workers and the form-binding regression worker all used focused CLI tests while `.factory/skills/designer-tracking-worker/SKILL.md` still requires agent-browser manual verification for every feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: The `designer-tracking-worker` skill is a poor fit for baseline-only test recovery work in measurement/annotation code. Its procedure requires TDD and browser-based manual verification of designer tracking flows, but this worker only re-ran CLI tests on unrelated files and explicitly skipped the skill's UI verification step.

Residual `localhost:3000` noise is already explained by the repo's API base fallback logic and existing review API tests, but the worker recorded it only as a generic discovered issue instead of connecting it to the actual files governing that behavior.
